## Kshetrajna Technologies Frontend Build

Complete modern React + Vite + Tailwind CSS website for a corporate software development agency.

### ✅ Completed Steps

- [x] **Clarify Project Requirements**: React + Vite + Tailwind + TypeScript website build
- [x] **Scaffold the Project**: Created complete Vite + React project structure
- [x] **Configure Project Files**:
  - vite.config.ts - Vite configuration with React plugin
  - tsconfig.json & tsconfig.node.json - TypeScript configuration
  - tailwind.config.js & postcss.config.js - Tailwind & PostCSS setup
  - package.json - Dependencies and scripts

- [x] **Create Components**:
  - TopBanner.tsx - Green announcement banner
  - Navbar.tsx - Navigation with dropdown and mobile menu
  - Hero.tsx - Hero section with background image overlay
  - Stats.tsx - 4-card statistics section
  - Services.tsx - 3x3 interactive services grid
  - Leadership.tsx - Leadership team cards
  - Process.tsx - 4-step process timeline
  - ContactForm.tsx - Contact form + company info
  - Footer.tsx - Footer with newsletter signup
  - WhatsAppWidget.tsx - Floating WhatsApp chat button

- [x] **Global Styling**:
  - index.css - Tailwind directives and custom components
  - Tailwind config with green color palette
  - Font imports for Plus Jakarta Sans

- [x] **Documentation**: README.md with feature overview and setup instructions

### ⏭️ Next Steps


**Key Features**:
- Smooth animations and hover effects
- Modern green gradient branding
- Contact form with validation
- Newsletter signup
- WhatsApp integration
- SEO-ready structure

**Sections Implemented**:
1. Sticky top banner with tagline
2. Navigation bar with Services dropdown
3. Full-screen hero section
4. Company statistics (2,500+ projects, 100% success, etc.)
5. 9-card services grid
6. Leadership team profiles
7. 4-step working process timeline
8. Contact form with company information
9. Multi-column footer with newsletter
10. Floating WhatsApp chat widget
